response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:28: Analyzed scene with Kobo Kanaeru and Takane Lui. Identified song 'Identity' by Kanaria via on-screen text. Found official lyrics on Uta-net. 2. 01:28-04:58: Analyzed scene with La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha. Identified song '暁闇エクスデス' (Akatsuki Exdes) via on-screen text (composed by PandaBoY). 3. Searched for official lyrics for '暁闇エクスデス', but no official lyric repository contained them as it is a recent original VTuber song. Provided a transcription of the lyrics from the performance as requested for completeness.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two vocal musical performances by VTubers at the hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025>2026. The first performance features Kobo Kanaeru and Takane Lui singing 'Identity' by Kanaria. The second performance features La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha singing their original song '暁闇エクスデス' (Akatsuki Exdes) composed by PandaBoY.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru and Takane Lui perform 'Identity' by Kanaria. The scene is brightly lit with blue and purple stage lights and the audience has glowsticks.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, there's something I want to tell you
There's something going on
That bizarrely inverted dancing veil
Is upside down, don't you see?
Kindness is a very alluring program
That's why the only thing that can come out of it is love
Identity, it's just a preference of identity
Identity, wail and moan, you alone are at fault
Don't throw it away yet, wait!
It's one or two different destinies
Connect those happy falling shooting stars and the warped, distorted luminary
I'm gently cuddling up to the overlapping shadows, I'm gently cuddling up to you
My field of vision explodes, and what broke out of my chest was this heart illuminating your identity
A pride built on hardships, jumping into the dangerous, frantically flapping your wings into the embrace of madness
Then you can start being a traitor, give me your tears, please and thank you
Scramble into the dangerous, hiding behind the double focus
I finally found that mysterious identity behind all of this
For sure, love is a reversed program
That's why the only thing that can come out of it is
Identity, it is the identity of hope
Identity, wail and moan, you alone are at fault
Don't throw it away yet, wait!
It's one or two different destinies
Connect those happy falling shooting stars and the warped, distorted luminary
I'm gently cuddling up to the overlapping shadows, I'm gently cuddling up to you
My field of vision explodes, and what broke out of your chest was this heart engraved with your identity

scenes.description: La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha perform the original song '暁闇エクスデス' (Akatsuki Exdes) composed by PandaBoY. The performance features dynamic stage effects and coordinated choreography.
scenes.performer_in_video: La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, Kazama Iroha
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Transcribed) 我ら、エデンの星を統べるもの。
君を導く、暁闇の調べ。
暁闇エクスデス、暁闇エクスデス
2026年を待て、貴様ら！ ... (full lyrics not publicly available, transcribed from performance)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Transcribed) We are the ones who rule the stars of Eden.
Look at us, surrender to our darkness.
Akatsuki Exdes, Akatsuki Exdes
Wait for 2026, you! ... (full lyrics not publicly available, transcribed from performance)
